services.name: E-commerce Launch & Operations
services.short_description: Marketplace setup, listings, and backend operations for product businesses.
services.detailed_description: Launch and optimize Flipkart/Meesho and marketplace operations with catalog hygiene, pricing logic, and process discipline.
services.ideal_client: For product-based businesses selling on marketplaces.
highlights: Flipkart and Meesho seller setup and optimization

services.name: Performance Marketing & Content
services.short_description: Lead generation campaigns and content systems designed for conversion.
services.detailed_description: Build a practical growth engine with ad campaigns, landing pages, and short-form content tailored to your audience.
services.ideal_client: For D2C brands and local businesses ready to scale leads.
highlights: Short-form content for Instagram and YouTube

services.name: Brand & Packaging Systems
services.short_description: Brand identity, packaging readiness, and conversion-first product presentation.
services.detailed_description: Define naming, story, and design direction while ensuring packaging and product documents are practical and marketplace-ready.
services.ideal_client: For founders launching new products or repositioning existing brands.
highlights: Packaging design support for shipping and compliance

services.name: GST & FSSAI Compliance Support
services.short_description: Documentation and compliance support so businesses can sell confidently.
services.detailed_description: Organize compliance workflows across GST, HSN logic, Udyam, and FSSAI support to reduce operational bottlenecks.
services.ideal_client: For retailers and food/product businesses needing compliant e-commerce operations.

services.name: AI & Automation for Small Businesses
services.short_description: Simple internal automations and dashboards to save time and improve visibility.
services.detailed_description: Design practical automations and reporting views for sales, operations, and content workflows.
services.ideal_client: For SMB teams that need lean systems instead of enterprise complexity.
